description: This file defines a custom theme class 'OceanTheme' for a Flutter application, including color schemes and theme data for light and dark modes.

classes.name: OceanTheme
classes.description: A class providing custom theme configurations for light and dark themes in a Flutter app, using predefined color constants.

methods.name: light
methods.description: Returns a ThemeData object configured for light mode, with specific color scheme and component styles.

methods.name: dark
methods.description: Returns a ThemeData object configured for dark mode, with specific color scheme and component styles.
